w:r.w:t: Carl Pinto - Leader/Backend (ML and AI RAG)

TrustShield is a comprehensive cybersecurity solution that leverages AI-powered RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and Google Search Grounding to detect and neutralize multi-modal digital threats in real-time.
Preventing phishing and vishing scams along with deepfakes recognition to prevent advanced AI based scams.

The Challenge: The digital threat landscape has evolved beyond traditional phishing. Today's users face vishing (Voice Phishing) using AI-generated voices, sophisticated phishing emails that bypass spam filters, deepfake images and videos spreading misinformation, and malicious URLs disguised as legitimate websites.
Target Audience: Elderly individuals most vulnerable to social engineering and corporate workers handling sensitive data daily.

Current Limitations: Existing solutions suffer from limited API access and rate constraints, poor Android integration, no unified platform for multi-modal threat detection, and reactive rather than proactive protection.
Core Idea: TrustShield creates a seamless security layer across all digital touchpoints calls, messages, emails, and browsing by combining cutting-edge AI with intuitive user experience.
Smart Extension: Highlight any text or URL on any website and instantly scan for misinformation or phishing indicators.
Live Call Monitoring: Real-time audio analysis in 5-second batches to detect deepfake voices during calls without interrupting conversation.
Email Protection: Comprehensive email analysis detecting spoofing, sender verification, and malicious attachments.
Visual Deepfake Detection: Upload screenshots or images to verify authenticity.
Unified Dashboard: Mobile app centralizes all scans, alerts, and detailed reports.

Innovation and USP: The application can scan audio from calls in batches of 5 seconds and deliver a detailed safety verdict via email all without interrupting the user's conversation. This real-time non-intrusive approach to vishing detection sets TrustShield apart from conventional security tools.
AI and ML: Hugging Face Spaces, Trained ML Models
APIs: VirusTotal, Gemini AI, Google Search Grounding

Data Capture: The user encounters suspicious content. They highlight text or URLs using the Plasmo extension, upload screenshots to the React Native app, or have the app actively monitor a live audio call in 5-second batches.
Processing and Routing: The frontend transmits the payload (image, text chunk, or 5-second audio batch) to the FastAPI backend.

Analysis Engine: The backend orchestrates the analysis. It queries VirusTotal for URLs, uses Hugging Face models for specific deepfake detection, and leverages Gemini AI with Google Search Grounding to contextualize and fact-check the content.

Verdict Delivery: The backend synthesizes the results into a structured risk score from LOW to CRITICAL and returns it to the client triggering immediate UI alerts and sending a detailed summary email to the user.

We successfully integrated a streaming pipeline that captures microphone audio during a call, chunks it into 5-second asynchronous batches, and feeds it to our Hugging Face hosted audio models without interrupting the user's call experience. We implemented an abstraction layer in FastAPI to seamlessly combine results from deterministic APIs like VirusTotal with probabilistic AI outputs like Gemini RAG to generate a unified weighted safety verdict.
Audio Processing Latency: Less than 2 seconds per 5-second audio batch enabling near real-time vishing alerts.
Successfully integrated 4 distinct analysis modalities (Text, URL, Image, Audio) into a single unified API endpoint.
Consistent and reliable risk scoring across all input types with clear LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, and CRITICAL classifications.

Market Potential: With global cybercrime costs projected to reach trillions annually, the demand for accessible consumer-grade AI-driven security tools is massive. ISPs, telecom providers, and enterprise IT departments are all seeking solutions for endpoint vishing and phishing protection.

By leveraging scalable cloud infrastructure through Hugging Face Spaces and Supabase and efficient serverless-style API routing via FastAPI, the backend can easily horizontally scale to handle 10,000 plus concurrent active users.
TrustShield directly protects vulnerable demographics particularly the elderly from devastating financial and emotional harm caused by increasingly convincing AI-generated scams.

Free security APIs come with strict rate limits, throttling our threat detection during peak usage. Solution: We implemented intelligent result caching and a queue-based request system that respects rate limits while maintaining user experience.

Android blocks background processing and live call audio access, limiting real-time protection. Solution: We leveraged Accessibility Service API for screen content capture and switched to user-initiated scans instead of continuous monitoring, working within platform constraints.

Different ML models (Hugging Face vs Gemini) produced inconsistent outputs. Solution: We built a weighted scoring algorithm that normalizes all results into standardized LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, and CRITICAL ratings.

Ensuring identical threat detection across mobile and extension was complex. Solution: We created a shared API contract both frontends consume, guaranteeing feature parity and consistent user experience.
: Beta testing the mobile app with a closed group of non-technical users to refine the UI, UX, and false-positive rates.
Launching the mobile application on Android and iOS app stores and the extension on the Chrome Web Store.
Partnering with local telecom providers to integrate our API directly at the network level offering automatic vishing protection without requiring an app installation.
Expanding to enterprise solutions with custom dashboards and compliance reporting for corporate security teams.

The Runtime Terrors team set out to build a comprehensive multi-modal defense against the next generation of cyber threats. With TrustShield we have proven that complex resource-intensive AI models can be seamlessly brought to the edge through an intuitive mobile app and browser extension providing everyday users with the vital real-time protection they need against phishing deepfakes and vishing. Our solution bridges the gap between advanced AI capabilities and practical accessible security for all.
THANK YOU FOR TAKING THE TIME IN VIEWING OUR SUBMISSION
